items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 24 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Eco Wave Power Turns Waves Into Watts With NVIDIA AI Infrastructure and Digital Twins」、「At Cannes Lions, NVIDIA Partners Reshape Advertising and Marketing With AI」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
